title: Aam ka Achaar (Home)
description: A large-batch family mango pickle cured in the sun with mustard oil and traditional spices.
steps: Combine all spices with mustard oil to make a thick masala concentrate.
Mix the completely dried mango pieces with the masala.
Transfer to a clean, dry jar and cover with cotton cloth rather than a tight lid.
Sun-cure for 4–10 days depending on the weather.
Add enough mustard oil to fully submerge the mangoes, then store in a cool, dry place.
notes: Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
